title: Survival-Friendly NPCs
description: Adds NPCs that can be crafted with the "Heart of Life" item.
body: Adds craftable NPCs to your world. Craftable with the "Heart of Life" item. The "Heart of Life can be crafted with 2 redstone dust, 2 glowstone dust, a heart of the sea, oak sapling, dark oak sapling, jungle sapling and acacia sapling. It can spawn an NPC. the NPC cannot walk/run or move in anyway it just for decoration. to make the NPC spawn egg just place a Heart of Life item in your crafting table!
